quality_notes: Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
📌 Career Leverage Shift

AI is changing discoverability faster than most people realize. 🔎

One moment made this obvious to me: assistants now surface people and companies from clear public signals, not just ads. That shifts the game toward proof, clarity, and consistency. 📈

Moment -> Insight -> Action 1 -> Action 2 -> Action 3

Three actions that work right away: tighten your headline, publish concrete outcomes, and keep a steady posting rhythm. 🛠️

💬 What signal do you want AI tools to associate with your profile?

#AIAgents #FutureOfWork #PersonalBranding #CareerGrowth #ArtificialIntelligence
